title: Large Language Models Path
description: Build fluency in Large Language Models inside AI Types by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: TensorRT-LLM
steps.summary: TensorRT-LLM belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after LLM and TensorRT. It opens into NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM and TensorRT-LLM on Jetson.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Large Language Model
steps.summary: Large Language Model belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after Language Models and Large Model Architecture. It opens into Large Language Model (LLM) and Large Language Models (LLMs).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Multimodal Transformers
steps.summary: Multimodal Transformers belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after Multimodal Models and Transformers. It opens into Unified Multimodal Transformers and Multimodal Diffusion Transformers.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Phi-3 Mini
steps.summary: Phi-3 Mini belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after Phi-4 and Phi-3. It opens into Phi-4 mini flash and Phi-4-mini-flash-reasoning model (SambaY hybrid architecture).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Multimodal AI
steps.summary: Multimodal AI belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after Multimodal Models and AI in Architecture. It opens into AI in Multimodal Sensing.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Multimodal Dialogue
steps.summary: Multimodal Dialogue belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after Multimodal Models and Dialogue System. It opens into Slot Filling in Multimodal Dialogue Systems.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Multimodal Embedding
steps.summary: Multimodal Embedding belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after Multimodal Models and Embedding. It opens into Native Multimodal Embedding.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Large Language Model (LLM)
steps.summary: Large Language Model (LLM) belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Large Language Models. It sits inside AI Types / Large Language Models. Start after Large Language Model and LLM.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
